title: Japanese Midnight Lemon Chicken
description: A twist on Japanese fried chicken, featuring a midnight-inspired creamy sauce and a hint of lemon.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, and a pinch of salt.
2. Cut the chicken breast into bite-sized pieces and dredge in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
3. Heat about 1/2-inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Fry the chicken until golden brown, about 5-7 minutes per side.
5. In a separate saucepan, combine creamy sauce, lemon juice, and soy sauce (if using).
6. Bring the sauce to a simmer over medium heat, whisking constantly.
7. Once the chicken is cooked, remove it from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
8. Toss the chicken in the creamy sauce until coated.
9. Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges and toasted sesame seeds (optional).
